aboutus.subtitle: Passion for Cartagena
aboutus.description1: At HR Tours Cartagena, we design memories that last. We combine local warmth with technical efficiency so you can enjoy without worries.

tres.descripcion: desconecta del estres y conecta con ell paraiso.

pao.descripcion: Hotel y restaurante con piscina de agua dulce, actividades diarias de bienestar y snorkel guiado incluido.

mucura.descripcion: Escápate a aguas cristalinas con almuerzo premium caribeño y acceso completo a zonas sociales y de juegos.

islas.title: Islas Category
islas.subtitle: Ready for the trip of your dreams?
islas.text: Your Caribbean adventure starts here. Discover dreamy beaches, crystal-clear waters, and the rest you deserve. Book your place in paradise today.

city.title: Category City
city.subtitle: Experience the city, don't just visit it.
city.text: Leave the typical paths behind and immerse yourself in the real rhythm of the streets. From imposing monuments to the most photogenic hidden corners, we've designed routes so you can feel the local energy in your bones. Ready to discover your next favorite place?
